emails.subject: First draft
emails.body: First draft Is this what you were thinking about?

emails.subject: Re: First draft
emails.body: Re: First draft SInce this is purely an internal requirement, do you think the attached is OK? I'd prefer to leave the stuff out regarding ownership. Let me know. Ben

emails.subject: Re: First draft

emails.subject: Re: First draft
emails.body: It is worth a try, but it would be unusually generous of the power systems group to go along without push back. At least now we will see where we stand. Did Herman leave you a voice mail telling you that getting GE to sign off like this wouldn't do the trick? I'm guessing you've decided to appeal. Kay Ben F Jacoby@ECT 05/14/2001 06:29 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
